programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A Richland County pursuit ends in a crash and the discovery of suspected stolen goods; in Nye County, officers confront excuses after finding keys believed to be stolen; in El Paso, a homemade cast leaves officers puzzled.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Richland County investigate a suspected double carjacking; in Warwick, a driver causes a serious crash tied to road rage; in Salinas, police search for a suspect believed to be hiding in a residence.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A K9 in Greene County tracks down a suspected stolen car driver; in Warwick, a bar patron insists he wasn't driving; in Mission, officers question a confused burglary suspect.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: The K9 units are on the chase with pursuits in Richland and Pasco Counties, a fleeing vehicle triggers a high-speed pursuit in Franklin County, and it's sassy backtalk in Mission, Texas.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Texas search for Charlotte the pig; Extraterrestrial visitors in Nye County; Salinas officers encounter a scene that's a complete dumpster fire.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers respond to a scary crash in Mission, Texas; an altercation in Nye County leads to a near miss between a car and a bicycle; a K9 vehicle search in Pasco County, and a triple X traffic stop in Warwick.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers are on the hunt for burglars in Nye County; Deputy Carmack makes a key arrest in Pasco County, while Danny Brown is on the chase in Richland during a suspected drug bust; police team with animal control for a bunny rescue in Warwick.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: Officers in Indiana chase a car full of women; in Illinois, police investigate a man who has allegedly taken dangerous drugs; in California, a suspected gang member barricades himself inside his car as police attempt to get him out.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: Troopers in Arizona engage in a high-speed vehicle pursuit with spike strips; in Florida officers use pepper balls to subdue a suspect; when officers in Missouri receive a report involving an alleged gunshot victim, they arrive on scene to find something they didn't expect.
